summary: P2 and P3 Tasks Testing Complete - Sync History page with charts, filters, and refactored components all working correctly. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/sync-history returns list with all required fields (id, supplier_id, supplier_name, sync_type, status, imported, updated, errors, duration_seconds, created_at)
Backend: GET /api/sync-history?status=error filters only error records correctly
Backend: GET /api/sync-history?status=success filters only success records correctly
Backend: GET /api/sync-history?days=7 filters by date range (7 days vs 30 days returns correct counts)
Backend: GET /api/sync-history/stats returns valid statistics (total, success, errors, partial, total_imported, total_updated, total_errors, avg_duration, daily_stats)
Backend: GET /api/sync-history/stats daily_stats has correct format for recharts (date, count, success, errors)
Backend: GET /api/sync-history/stats?days=7 respects days filter
Backend: GET /api/sync-history without auth returns 401/403
Backend: GET /api/sync-history/stats without auth returns 401/403
Frontend: Login with test@test.com/test123 works correctly
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Historial de Syncs' link (data-testid='nav-sync-history')
Frontend: SyncHistory page loads at /sync-history with title 'Historial de Sincronizaciones'
Frontend: Stats cards display (Total: 25, Exitosas: 16, Errores: 6, Parciales: 3, Importados: 5,423, Actualizados: 2,198, Errores prod.: 161, Tiempo med.: 1m 1s)
Frontend: Bar chart (recharts) displays 'Sincronizaciones por día' with Errores (red) and Exitosas (green) bars
Frontend: Filter dropdown 'Todos los proveedores' (data-testid='filter-supplier') works
Frontend: Filter dropdown 'Todos los estados' (data-testid='filter-status') filters correctly (shows only error records when Error selected)
Frontend: Filter dropdown 'Últimos 30 días' (data-testid='filter-days') works (7 days shows 5 records, 30 days shows 25)
Frontend: Update button 'Actualizar' refreshes data
Frontend: Table shows 25 sync history rows with columns (Proveedor, Tipo, Estado, Importados, Actualizados, Errores, Duración, Fecha)
Frontend: Status badges show correctly (Exitoso green, Error red, Parcial amber)
Frontend: Sync type badges show correctly (Manual, Programado)
Frontend: ProductDetailDialog opens on product view click with two tabs (Proveedores, Datos del Producto)
Frontend: ProductDetailDialog 'Proveedores' tab shows best offer and all supplier prices
Frontend: ProductDetailDialog 'Datos del Producto' tab shows all editable fields (Nombre, Estado toggles, Identificadores, Marca, Stock fields, Envío fields)
Frontend: ProductDetailDialog has save button 'Guardar Cambios' (data-testid='save-product-btn')
Frontend: Suppliers page loads with supplier list and 'Añadir Proveedor' button
critical_code_review_comments: SyncHistory.jsx properly uses recharts BarChart component for daily statistics visualization
Backend dashboard.py sync-history endpoints correctly aggregate data with MongoDB pipelines
services/sync.py record_sync_history function properly records all sync operations with duration tracking
ProductDetailDialog.jsx refactored with proper tabs and all editable fields
FtpFileBrowser.jsx refactored with multi-file selection and role assignment
Sidebar.jsx includes 'Historial de Syncs' navigation item with History icon
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all sync history and refactored component features verified)

seed_data_creation: 25 sync_history entries already seeded by main agent for testing (various suppliers, statuses, dates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sync History feature (P2/P3) fully working. Key data-testid attributes: sync-history-title, filter-supplier, filter-status, filter-days, sync-row-{id}. ProductDetailDialog data-testid: product-detail-tabs, tab-proveedores, tab-datos, edit-name, edit-ean, edit-price, edit-stock, edit-description, save-product-btn, edit-activado-si. Stats endpoint returns daily_stats array for recharts chart with {date, count, success, errors} format.
